description: Comparison mapping between SC-GL/2-2023 (R1-2024) controls and BNM RMiT requirements. Both frameworks address similar technology risk domains but for different regulated sectors (capital markets vs banking/insurance).

mappings.notes: Both frameworks require board-level technology risk governance with similar structures
Comparable requirements for threat intelligence and SOC operations
Both require systematic vulnerability management with penetration testing
Similar cloud risk assessment requirements though RMiT is more prescriptive on data residency
Both require risk-based vendor assessment with similar governance expectations
Comparable BCP requirements though SC has market operation-specific elements
Both require incident response plans with regulatory notification requirements
SC focuses more on market data integrity; RMiT on customer data protection
Algorithmic trading governance is unique to SC guidelines — no direct RMiT equivalent
Both require risk-based technology audit programmes
